title: PSM Employee Participation Record
description: Evidence model for PSM Employee Participation records per OSHA-KR Article 44.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for the employee participation record

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the record was created

agent_id.description: ID of the agent that generated this record

legal_basis.description: Multi-source legal basis. Primary: OSHA-KR Article 44 (PSM — employee participation). Adjacent laws may include: OSHA-KR Article 12 (safety and health committee), SAPA Article 4 (worker participation in safety system).

activity_type.description: Type of PSM activity in which employees participated.

participants.description: Array of worker IDs who participated in the activity.

psm_element_discussed.description: The PSM element that was the focus of the participation activity.

recommendations_submitted.description: List of recommendations submitted by workers during the activity.

management_response.description: Management's formal written response to the recommendations submitted.

implementation_status.description: Current implementation status of the worker recommendations.
